message:
feat(ffs-core): device-based readdir and name lookup (bd-2hm)

Add directory operations to OpenFs using extent mapping + ByteDevice:
- read_dir: reads all directory entries from a directory inode
- lookup_name: looks up a single name in a directory inode

Both methods iterate directory data blocks via extent mapping, read
each block from the device, and parse entries using parse_dir_block /
lookup_in_dir_block from ffs-ondisk.

3 new tests with a synthetic directory image containing ".", "..",
and "hello.txt" entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
